summary: Completed backend + frontend E2E validation for template/settings enhancements on public URL. All requested flows passed: ready checkbox, two-step create modal, collapsed section name headers, section reorder (buttons + drag-drop) with persistence, subsection expand/collapse, two-step archive confirmation + archived view, archived exclusion from builder READY selection, and settings delete-user removing login access.
action_items: No blocking fixes required for requested scope.
Optional maintainability follow-up: split very large page/server files into smaller modules.
critical_code_review_comments: /app/frontend/src/pages/TemplatesPage.jsx is 903 lines (>700 guideline threshold) and should be split into focused components.
/app/backend/server.py is 1222 lines (>700 guideline threshold) and should be modularized by domain (auth/templates/users/prompts).
seed_data_creation: Created test artifacts during UI/API testing: templates with prefix TEST_UI_TMPL_/TEST_ARCHIVE_FLOW_ and temporary users with prefix ui_del_. Most temporary users were deleted during validation; some earlier failed-run users may remain and can be cleaned if needed.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Archive/delete flows rely on browser confirm dialogs; in Playwright, use page.on('dialog', ...) auto-accept handling for stable execution. Reorder persistence validated by Save -> Back -> Reopen comparison.
rca of the issue: No functional product defects identified in this requested scope. Earlier automation instability was due to dialog-handling strategy in test script (event timing), resolved by registering dialog handlers before click actions.
